functions.name: TextInput
params: { label, hint, id, invalid, className, disabled, ...rest }

functions.name: BackendSelector
params:
{
  value,
  onChange,
  disabled,
  id,
  name,
  className,
  ariaLabel,
}

functions.name: ConfirmDialog
params:
{
  open,
  title,
  message,
  confirmLabel = 'Xác nhận',
  cancelLabel = 'Huỷ',
  confirmVariant = 'primary',
  busy = false,
  onConfirm,
  onCancel,
}

callGraph.callee: `inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-md bg-red-100 px-2 py-0.5 font-mono text-[10.5px] font-semibold text-red-700 ${className}`.trim

functions.name: DiffViewer
params:
{
  original,
  modified,
  language = 'plaintext',
  height = '50vh',
  title,
  onLineClick,
  onModifiedEditor,
  highlightedLine = null,
}

functions.name: DocumentEditor
params:
{
  value,
  onChange,
  readOnly = false,
  height = '60vh',
  ariaLabel = 'Markdown editor',
}

functions.name: InlineCommentOverlay
params:
{
  modifiedEditor,
  taskId,
  apiFilePath,
  comments,
  activeLine,
  onCloseComposer,
  onSaved,
}

functions.name: TaskCard
params:
{
  task,
  sortableDisabled = true,
  onStart,
  startBusy = false,
  onCancel,
  cancelBusy = false,
  onOpenReview,
  isReviewSelected = false,
  members = [],
  currentUserRole,
  onAssign,
  blockedByTitles = [],
}

callGraph.callee:
[
        styles.root,
        isDragging ? styles.rootDragging : '',
        isAgentRunning ? styles.rootAgentRunning : '',
        task.status === 'conflict' ? styles.rootConflict : '',
        isReviewSelected ? styles.rootReviewSelected : '',
        !sortableDisabled && !task.is_blocked ? styles.rootDraggable : '',
        task.is_blocked ? styles.rootBlocked : '',
        onOpenReview ? styles.rootClickable : '',
      ]
        .filter(Boolean)
        .join

[
        styles.root,
        isDragging ? styles.rootDragging : '',
        isAgentRunning ? styles.rootAgentRunning : '',
        task.status === 'conflict' ? styles.rootConflict : '',
        isReviewSelected ? styles.rootReviewSelected : '',
        !sortableDisabled && !task.is_blocked ? styles.rootDraggable : '',
        task.is_blocked ? styles.rootBlocked : '',
        onOpenReview ? styles.rootClickable : '',
      ]
        .filter
